---
id: execute-device-command-await
title: "设备命令执行并等待响应"
description: "通过 command 执行设备操作，并在服务端等待设备命令上报数据。"
sidebar_label: "设备命令执行并等待响应"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: i18n/zh/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/aiot-api/aiot-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"设备命令执行并等待响应"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/devices/command/execute/await"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



通过 command 执行设备操作，并在服务端等待设备命令上报数据。


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"Accesstoken","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Accesstoken}}"},"description":"通过授权获取的访问 Token。"},{"name":"Appid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Appid}}"},"description":"在 [Aqara 开发者平台](https://developer.aqara.com/) 创建应用时分配的 App ID。"},{"name":"Keyid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Keyid}}"},"description":"在 [Aqara 开发者平台](https://developer.aqara.com/) 创建应用时分配的 Key ID。"},{"name":"Nonce","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Nonce}}"},"description":"随机字符串，每次请求都不同。"},{"name":"Time","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Time}}"},"description":"请求时间戳，单位毫秒。"},{"name":"Sign","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Sign}}"},"description":"请求签名。如需了解签名生成方法，请参考 [Sign 生成规则](https://opendoc.aqara.cn/docs/%E4%BA%91%E5%BC%80%E5%8F%91/API%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E6%8C%87%E5%8D%97/Sign%E7%94%9F%E6%88%90%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99.html)。"},{"name":"Lang","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["zh","en"],"example":"en"},"description":"语言，默认英文。支持 'zh', 'en' 两种语言。"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["data"],"properties":{"data":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","endpointId","functionCode","commandCode"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"设备 ID。"},"endpointId":{"type":"integer","description":"端点 ID"},"functionCode":{"type":"string","description":"功能编码，如：\n- NetworkCommissioning\n"},"commandCode":{"type":"string","description":"命令编码，如：\n- TriggerZigbeeNetworkInfoUpload\n"},"args":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["fieldCode","value"],"properties":{"fieldCode":{"type":"string","description":"commandCode Field的filedCode"},"value":{"description":"参数值（推荐按对应 field 的 parameter.type 选择值类型）","oneOf":[{"type":"boolean"},{"type":"integer"},{"type":"number","format":"double"},{"type":"string"}],"title":"FlexibleValue"}},"title":"CommandArg"},"description":"command"}},"title":"CommandExecuteItem"}}},"title":"CommandExecuteRequest"},{"type":"object","properties":{"timeoutMs":{"type":"integer","format":"int32","description":"等待设备命令上报超时（毫秒）；不传使用服务端默认值","minimum":500,"maximum":10000}}}],"title":"CommandExecuteAwaitRequest"},"examples":{"executeCommandAwait":{"value":{"data":[{"deviceId":"gateway001","endpointId":1,"functionCode":"NetworkCommissioning","commandCode":"TriggerZigbeeNetworkInfoUpload","args":[{"fieldCode":"InstallCode","value":"F9B34846413AB5DE81B60E63E440"},{"fieldCode":"MAC","value":"54EF441000EB0CCF"}]}]}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"成功（data 返回每条命令的执行及设备上报结果）","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"消息类型。"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"接口版本。","example":"v4"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"消息 ID。"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"业务状态码，0 表示成功"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"提示信息。"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","endpointId","functionCode","commandCode","code","message","responded"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"设备 ID。"},"endpointId":{"type":"integer","description":"端点 ID。"},"functionCode":{"type":"string","description":"功能编码。"},"commandCode":{"type":"string","description":"命令编码。"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"执行结果码。"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"执行结果描述。"},"responded":{"type":"boolean","description":"是否收到设备该 command 的上报。"},"commandReportValue":{"type":"string","description":"设备该 command 的上报原始字符串，由调用端自行解析。"},"responseTime":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"设备 command 上报时间（毫秒时间戳）。"}},"title":"CommandExecuteAwaitResult"}}}}],"example":{"type":"ExecuteCommandAwaitResponse","version":"v4","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-00000000001a","code":0,"message":"success","data":[{"deviceId":"gateway001","endpointId":1,"functionCode":"NetworkCommissioning","commandCode":"TriggerZigbeeNetworkInfoUpload","code":0,"message":"success","responded":true,"commandReportValue":"{\"result\":\"ok\"}","responseTime":1710001234567}]},"title":"CommandExecuteAwaitResponse"},"examples":{"commandExecuteAwaitSuccess":{"value":{"type":"ExecuteCommandAwaitResponse","version":"v4","msgId":"2df2f431-a58d-4fdb-b39c-4f0d29e7ecfa","code":0,"message":"success","data":[{"deviceId":"gateway001","endpointId":1,"functionCode":"NetworkCommissioning","commandCode":"TriggerZigbeeNetworkInfoUpload","code":0,"message":"success","responded":true,"commandReportValue":"{\"result\":\"ok\"}","responseTime":1710001234567}]}}}}}},"400":{"description":"请求参数错误","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"example":{"type":"ErrorMessage","version":"v4","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-err000000001","code":400,"message":"参数
